prompt: I want to know what my research says about momentum factor decay — like how quickly momentum signals lose their alpha after formation. Also, separately, does my algo trading notebook have anything on transaction cost models for equity strategies?

assertions.text: Response uses hardcoded notebook IDs directly (contains '436d54d7' or '9b85bda7') without calling notebook_list first
Momentum decay question routed to Academic Research notebook; transaction cost question routed to algo trading notebook (not both to same notebook)
Response identifies which notebook answered each part of the question
Response includes at least 2 follow-up suggestions or related actions
Response contains substantive content from the notebooks, not just metadata or a description of what was queried
